$comment: Claude Code project MCP binding — the Main Agent (Claude Code) becomes the MCP CLIENT and dynamically discovers MyAvatar tools from the local server. Build the server once: `npm --prefix apps/myavatar-mcp-server install && npm --prefix apps/myavatar-mcp-server run build`. Set MYAVATAR_API_TOKEN (a Supabase bearer JWT) to unlock the authed produce/jobs tools.
